zh.lifeSummary: Mrs. Joan Dagwell於1485年出生在英國英格蘭哈普爾易斯爾 本 懷特諾武德。她於1502年與John Dagwell在英國英格蘭哈普爾易斯爾 本 懷特諾武德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1547年在英國哈普爾易斯爾 本 懷特諾武德享年62歲。

nameMeanings.name: Dagwell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Devon, Dorset, and Somerset): variant of Backwell, a habitational name from Backwell in Somerset, named with Old English bæc ‘ridge’ + wella ‘spring, stream’.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: Mrs. Joan Dagwell was born in 1485, in Northwood, Isle of Wight, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom. She married John Dagwell in 1502, in Northwood, Isle of Wight, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1547, in Northwood, Isle of Wight, Hampshire, England, at the age of 62.

ko.Northwood, Isle of Wight, Hampshire, Eng: 영국 함프실르 이슬일 프 와이트 노르스우드

ko.Northwood, Isle of Wight, England: 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 이슬일 프 와이트 노르스우드
ko.lifeSummary: Mrs. Joan Dagwell(은)는 1485년 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 이슬일 프 와이트 노르스우드에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1502년 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 이슬일 프 와이트 노르스우드에서 John Dagwell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1547년 영국 함프실르 이슬일 프 와이트 노르스우드에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Mrs. Joan Dagwell родилась в 1485 г. в местности нортвуд, исл оф ваит, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Dagwell в 1502 г. в местности нортвуд, исл оф ваит, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1547 г. в местности нортвуд, исл оф ваит, хампшир, Англия в возрасте 62 лет.
